transcript:
Discovery Call — Conroy Scott LLP
Date: May 15, 2026
Sales Rep: Jacob Meissner
Attorney/Contact: Adam Castonguay (Founder)
Recording: https://fathom.video/calls/674319777

--- MEETING SUMMARY ---

Firm Context:
- Firm: Conroy Scott LLP, Sudbury, Ontario. 68-year legacy firm, well-known locally.
- 2025 Revenue: $1.25M CAD. 2026 Projected: $1.5M CAD. Max revenue at current team capacity: ~$2.5M CAD.
- Team: 5 lawyers (Adam Castonguay is the only senior, experienced lawyer — handles 50%+ of revenue and all operational oversight). 8 support staff.
- Capacity: 30–40 new matters/month, 200 active matters at any time.
- Practice areas: Corporate (fixed-fee general counsel), Real Estate (transactions), Wills & Estates (at full capacity — no longer marketing this).
- Intake: Inefficient. A consultant is currently engaged to fix it. Lead sources not consistently tracked — poor data.
- Hiring: Difficult to find qualified lawyers in the Sudbury market.

Growth Goals:
- Primary: Grow Corporate practice with a fixed-fee 'general counsel' service (record-keeping, compliance, consultation). Creates annuity revenue. Can onboard ~200 new clients quickly.
- Secondary: Grow Real Estate from 12–13 to 20 transactions/month. Average case value ~$1,300.
- Wills & Estates is at capacity — NOT a target for growth marketing.

Current Marketing:
- Brand awareness: Local sports/golf course ads, newspaper sponsorships.
- Google Ads: $30/day budget (3 months old), generates 1–2 leads/day, mostly for Wills & Estates.
- Social Media: Basic organic posts, no paid boosting.
- Marketing objective: Maintain 68-year legacy brand as a 'household name' while driving new clients for Corporate and Real Estate.

Key Objections / History:
- Two years ago, SMB Team presented a $10k USD/month proposal. Adam rejected it — it represented the firm's entire profit margin and they couldn't handle the increased intake volume.
- Current willingness to revisit: Yes — firm now wants website rebuild and intake automation. Key concern is still USD pricing (they are a Canadian firm) and intake capacity.
- Recent JustCall outreach (May 13, 2026): Adam is open to services. Scheduled follow-up for Friday May 16 at 11:00 AM ET with Jacob Meissner.

Dominant Buying Motive:
- Adam is the bottleneck. The firm cannot grow beyond him. He wants to build a team and systems so the firm can run without him at the center of every decision. He wants to step back from operational control while revenue grows.

Close Rate: Not stated on call — default to 15%.
Average Case Value: Real Estate ~$1,300. Corporate general counsel TBD (annuity/fixed-fee model). Wills & Estates — not a growth target.
Revenue Goal: Not explicitly stated — infer $2M–$2.5M CAD (current team max).
Spanish Campaign: No.
Number of Locations: 1 (Sudbury, Ontario).

Proposal Call Scheduled: May 21, 2026 at 11:00 AM ET with Jacob Meissner.

Next Steps (from call):
- Jacob to consult SMB Team on a tailored proposal — mindful of past USD pricing concern and intake capacity.
- Jacob to send meeting recap email.
- Jacob and Adam to meet May 21 to review proposal and pricing.
